meaning: adj.熟悉的,常见的,听惯的,亲近的,随便的n.密友,熟客,常客
examples: He was humming a familiar tune.
He felt a longing for the familiar.
Today, of course, the word paedophilia is a familiar term in the news lexicon.
With its far-infrared detectors, Herschel has been able to re-visit familiar objects to provide new data.
